title: LocknLock Square 870ml (155 x 155 x 60mm)
features: Freezer safe microwave safe dishwasher safe (top rack only)
description: From the manufacturer LocknLock An ideal range of containers for lunches, salads, leftovers or any other items needing to be stored. The LocknLock silicone seal and locking mechanism means that your favourite foods can be created and stored hours before eating and yet still remain as delicious and fresh as the second they were made. Four sided lockable lid 100% airtight leak proof Easy to use and clean Microwave safe Freezer safe BPA free Multipurpose Containers Use our containers for food or any other purpose. All size and Shape Square, rectangle, round, our containers cover all you needs. LocknLock silicone locking system Ultra secure locking system to keep your food safe and fresh. LocknLock Discover our full range of LocknLock food containers. Round, rectangular, square or sets, we cover all your needs.
